title: shorea assamica subsp. koordersii
intro: Shorea assamica subsp. koordersii, also known as the Assam tree, is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae that is native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Shorea assamica subsp. koordersii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
